arts.ttl: Liverpool name strong team for Tottenham with Trent Alexander-Arnold and one more key man benched
arts.sum: Arne Slot has named Liverpool's XI for the clash with Tottenham Hotspur in the League Cup on Tuesday

arts.ttl: 'What we do know is' - Liverpool handed new Trent Alexander-Arnold contract verdict
arts.sum: Trent Alexander-Arnold is out of contract at the end of the season and has been the subject of an approach from Real Madrid

arts.ttl: Arne Slot makes Trent Alexander-Arnold decision for Liverpool's clash with Tottenham
arts.sum: Trent Alexander-Arnold endured an awful game against Manchester United on Sunday and boss Arne Slot has now dropped him for the Carabao Cup clash with Tottenham

arts.ttl: Trent Alexander-Arnold is DROPPED by Liverpool for Carabao Cup semi-final at Tottenham after Man United horror show as Real Madrid try to sign him
arts.sum: The England right-back, who has been left out for 21-year-old starlet Conor Bradley, put in one of his worst performances in a Liverpool shirt on Sunday as his side drew 2-2 with bitter rivals Man United.

arts.ttl: Tottenham v Liverpool: Carabao Cup semi-final, first leg – live
arts.sum: Carabao Cup semi-final news from the 8pm GMT kick-off Catch up on today’s Football Daily | Arsenal 0-2 Newcastle EFL hits back at Arteta: ‘All clubs play with the same ball’ “Spurs’ new young goalie will have a busy debut against my Reds anyway so we shouldn’t load another burden on him by giving him a funny but wrong name,” writes Ernst Draxl. “It’s Antonin Kinsky.” Thanks, those have been changed now. They were typos (it’s been a while) rather than attempts at hilarity. All the players are fit at the moment but if we drop points when we have injuries, people say it is because you have injuries. If Mo [Salah] misses a penalty against [Real] Madrid he is distracted by his contract situation. If Trent [Alexander-Arnold] has not his best performance [against Manchester United] he is distracted by the contract situation. If they play really well nobody tells me: ‘That’s because they have a contract situation.’ We always try to find arguments but nine out of 10 times the best argument is the quality of the team you face or the gameplan the other team has. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Tottenham vs Liverpool TV channel, live stream details and how to watch Carabao Cup clash
arts.sum: Tottenham will look to end a four-match winless run when they host Carabao Cup holders Liverpool in their semi-final first-leg clash on Wednesday. Below are all the details on how to follow Spurs' first-leg clash against Arne Slot's Liverpool...

arts.ttl: Antonin Kinsky agent reveals 'intense' two-day negotiations with Daniel Levy secured Tottenham move
arts.sum: Kinsky joined from Sparta Prague for a fee of £12.5million plus add-ons

arts.ttl: How to watch Tottenham vs Liverpool - TV channel, live stream details, kick-off time
arts.sum: Liverpool will look to move closer to their first major trophy under Arne Slot when they face Tottenham Hotspur in the Carabao Cup semi-finals
